# This file contains information about any third-party libraries or frameworks used in the project.

# Vendor Libraries Used in Booking App

## Bootstrap
Bootstrap is used for responsive design and styling components. It helps in creating a mobile-first layout and provides pre-designed components like buttons, forms, and navigation.

## jQuery
jQuery is included to simplify DOM manipulation and event handling. It allows for easier AJAX requests and enhances the interactivity of the application.

## Payment Gateway
The application integrates with a payment gateway that supports card payments and Apple Pay in the UAE. Ensure to follow the documentation provided by the payment gateway for implementation details.

## Additional Libraries
If any additional libraries are used in the project, please document them here along with their purpose and usage instructions.

# Installation
To install the necessary libraries, you can use a package manager like npm or include them via CDN links in your HTML files.

# Usage
Refer to the documentation of each library for specific usage instructions and examples.
